name: lark
description: Lark digital command center with a coordination diagnosis engine. Orchestrates chat, approvals, meetings, docs, and spreadsheets while minimizing organizational friction.
author: qclawbot

capabilities.coordination_diagnosis: Diagnose collaboration friction before selecting an action path
capabilities.tactical_orchestration: Choose the best operational layer and action type under real constraints
capabilities.handshake_protocol: Enforce mode selection for operational safety
capabilities.red_line_protection: Suppress high-friction or high-sensitivity actions without confirmation
capabilities.context_recovery: Recover the real decision context across chats, meetings, docs, and sheets

audience: Teams using Lark as a central coordination layer
